name: Cherry Nut Easter Egg
recipeIngredient: 1 cup finely chopped pecans or walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cherries in half and drain well on paper towels.
2. Cook the milk, butter, and pudding mix in a medium saucepan over low heat until well blended and thick.
3. Remove from heat and add the cherries, nuts, and enough sugar to make a thick consistency.
4. Form the mixture into 8 to 10 egg shapes using hands coated in butter.
5. Place on wax paper-covered cookie sheet. Chill several hours until firm.
6. Melt chocolate carefully, being mindful not to scorch it.
7. Frost the eggs with melted chocolate.
8. Decorate with buttercream icing.
